title: Colourful Earth
description: You will now be able to dye any dirt block in the game, using your favorite colored dyes! In this way, you will be able to use a lot of new blocks to decorate your buildings or games.
body:
![COLOURFUL EARTH BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/blQC9FUr/images/8b7eb49b3bf3d7463431b80e473c9579d399e04d.webp) You will now be able to dye any dirt block in the game, using your favorite colored dyes! In this way, you will be able to use a lot of new blocks to decorate your buildings or games. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![COLOURFUL EARTH SUMMARY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/blQC9FUr/images/1e14820465e8e05a8f31289ca198e34df8929f5b.webp) Basically, with this mod we intend to completely expand the variety of building blocks in the game, as well as, in the same way, give extra utility to the dirt and grass blocks. Therefore, both dirt and grass blocks can be tinted, making use of the default tints added in the "vanilla" version of the game. Furthermore, both blocks act in a very similar way. ![COLOURFUL EARTH F.A.Q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/blQC9FUr/images/75a186b0114948d33e4ed95a09ba4d2b1b673b1a.webp) ### Can colorful grass be propagated? Yes indeed. The colorful grass works exactly the same as the "vanilla" version in that respect, and therefore can be propagated without any problem. ### Can it be planted on top of the colored blocks? For now it is not possible, but it is something that we do not rule out for the future. Anyway, the main use of this mod is the possibility to build with a great variety of colored blocks. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![COLOURFUL EARTH SCREENSHOTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/blQC9FUr/images/becd9d30eb3c0da6747a6279427b2e446aafe6f6.webp) ![COLOURFUL EARTH IMAGE 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/blQC9FUr/images/a9fbab2e64d09af785b1a8e8999dd8a42e68d08b.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
